schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme &quot;Aastha Yojana&quot; was launched by the Department of Social Justice and Empowerment, Government of Rajasthan. It aims to provide BPL-equivalent benefits to families with multiple specially-abled members. Under this scheme, eligible families receive free medical treatment, ration supplies, and other welfare benefits. To avail of the benefits, a family must possess an Aastha Card, and their annual income should not exceed ₹1.20 lakh.
schemeContent.benefits_md:
- Aastha cardholder families receive benefits similar to BPL families, including free medical treatment and ration supplies.

**Note:** Aastha cardholders are entitled to benefits from all BPL-related schemes run by different state government departments.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide BPL-equivalent benefits to families with two or more specially-abled members. Under this scheme, eligible families receive free medical treatment, ration supplies, and other welfare benefits.

children.text: The scheme "Aastha Yojana" was launched by the Department of Social Justice and Empowerment, Government of Rajasthan. It aims to provide BPL-equivalent benefits to families with multiple specially-abled members. Under this scheme, eligible families receive free medical treatment, ration supplies, and other welfare benefits. To avail of the benefits, a family must possess an Aastha Card, and their annual income should not exceed ₹1.20 lakh.
Aastha cardholder families receive benefits similar to BPL families, including free medical treatment and ration supplies.
Aastha cardholders are entitled to benefits from all BPL-related schemes run by different state government departments.

The interested applicant should visit office of the District Social Justice & Empowerment Office and request a hard copy of the prescribed format of the application form from the staff exclusively entrusted to issue and collect filled-in applications.
In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to the District Social Justice & Empowerment Office.

Request a receipt or acknowledgment from the District Social Justice & Empowerment Office to whom the application has been submitted. Ensure that the receipt contains essential details such as the date and time of submission and a unique identification number (if applicable).

applicationProcess.process_md:
**Step 1:** The interested applicant should visit office of the District Social Justice &amp; Empowerment Office and request a hard copy of the prescribed format of the application form from the staff exclusively entrusted to issue and collect filled-in applications.
**Step 2:** In the application form, fill in all the mandatory fields and attach copies of all the mandatory documents (self-attest, if required).
**Step 3:** Submit the duly filled and signed application form along with the documents to the District Social Justice &amp; Empowerment Office.
**Step 4:** Request a receipt or acknowledgment from the District Social Justice &amp; Empowerment Office to whom the application has been submitted. Ensure that the receipt contains essential details such as the date and time of submission and a unique identification number (if applicable).

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. The applicant should be a native of Rajasthan.
1. The two or more members should be specially abled from the same family.
1. The applicant must have a disability of 40%.
1. The annual family income should not exceed ₹1,20,000/-.

children.text: The applicant should be a native of Rajasthan.
The two or more members should be specially abled from the same family.
The applicant must have a disability of 40%.
The annual family income should not exceed ₹1,20,000/-.
